title: Personalised Baby Blanket Embroidered Elephant & Name Soft Fleece Wrap (Blue Elephant Blue Squares)
features: BABY EMBROIDERED ELEPHANT BLANKET: Wrap little ones in warmth and love with our Personalised Baby Elephant Blanket. Crafted with care, this soft blanket features various design colours of an adorable elephant. This personalised baby blanket is perfect for providing comfort, warmth, with a gentle touch.

SOFT & WARM FLEECE BLANKET: This baby blanket is made from quality fleece fabric material, being soft and gentle on babies skin. It is available in many colours including adorable pink, blue, grey, white and beige, perfect to suit many choices.

PERFECT GIFT IDEA: Searching for the perfect personalised baby gift? Look no further! Our Personalised Baby Elephant Blanket makes an excellent choice for newborn gifts, baby showers, baby announcements, birthdays and Christmas. This beautiful, personalised blanket not only provides comfort but also serves as a cherished keepsake that will be treasured for years to come.
PERSONALISE THE ELEPHANT BLANKET: You can choose to have no name or embroidered with a name and elephant, in a colour of your choice, making them unique for baby and family.
description: Returns Policy: As this is a personalised item especially for you, if there isn't a manufacturing problem with the product or the personalised name embroidery, returns cannot be accepted. HOW TO ORDER: Choose your colour, click Customize Now. Here you will be able to choose the colour of name and elephant. We will set out the name carefully depending on size and fit suitable for the blanket. Add to Basket.
